description_long: This elderly person is depicted standing upright, dressed in a formal, ceremonial outfit. The attire consists of a bright red capelet and matching red hat, paired with a long, patterned white robe that extends to the ankles and a red underlayer visible at the bottom. The individual has pale skin, a stern facial expression, and straight, shoulder-length white hair that is partially covered by the hat. One hand is extended forward, holding a small rectangular object, possibly a book or card, while the other arm hangs naturally at the side. The overall appearance suggests a dignified, possibly religious or official figure, with a composed and authoritative demeanor.
description: An elderly person in a formal red and white ceremonial outfit, with a red hat and capelet, holding a small object in one hand and standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full ceremonial outfit, facial features, and the object held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the extended arm holding the object, and the layered garments.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the red capelet, the hat, and the full length of the robe.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, the hand holding the object, and the drape of the garments.
attribute_clothing_style: Formal ceremonial attire with a red capelet, red hat, long patterned white robe, and red underlayer; no visible accessories beyond the held object.
attribute_hairstyle: straight, shoulder-length white hair, partially covered by a red hat
attribute_facial_features: pale skin, stern expression, no visible facial hair or glasses, distinct eyebrows
